title: Interop Search Agent
description: An example of a search agent that can utilize Enterprise Browser Interop support.

configurationFields.name: intent
configurationFields.title: Primary Intent
configurationFields.placeholder: Which intent should this agent check for? e.g. 'ViewProfile' and launch as the primary action.

configurationFields.name: intent2
configurationFields.title: Secondary Intent?
configurationFields.placeholder: Which intent should this agent check for to offer as a secondary action? e.g. 'ViewContact'. Leave blank if you don't want a secondary action.

configurationFields.name: broadcast
configurationFields.title: Broadcast Context?
configurationFields.placeholder: Should this agent offer the option to broadcast an fdc3.contact context? YES/NO (or leave blank for NO)

configurationFields.name: dataSource
configurationFields.title: Data Source
configurationFields.placeholder: Do you want to specify a specific data source for the contacts vs the default rest endpoint.
